RULING:
DEFENDANT E.F. BRADY COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO ABATE ENTIRE ACTION PENDING JOINDER OF ALL NECESSARY PARTIES
DEFENDANT TURNER CONSTRUCTION COMPANY'S JOINDER, AND INTERVENORS ST. PAUL FIRE AND MARINE INSURANCE COMPANY, ET AL.'S JOINDER IN E.F. BRADY COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO ABATE ENTIRE ACTION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted as modified: Defendant E.F. Brady Company, Inc.'s motion to abate entire action pending joinder of all necessary parties is granted. Plaintiffs are compelled to properly join David Puchosic and realign him as a plaintiff. This action is stayed until then. If and when plaintiffs serve David Puchosic with the summons and complaint, plaintiffs may move the court to vacate the stay. Order signed in open court.
As to the motions of joinders, no objection made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Turner Construction Company's joinder in E.F. Brady Company, Inc.'s motion to abate entire action is off calendar as moot as the underlying motion remains on calendar and will be ruled on. Intervenors St. Paul Fire and Marine Insurance Company, et al. on behalf of Scott Co. of California's joinder in E.F. Brady Company, Inc.'s motion to abate entire action is off calendar as moot as the underlying motion remains on calendar and will be ruled on. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Tara A. Lohman of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13428 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
